TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Xavier_Bettel, title = Xavier_Bettel, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xavier_Bettel} }

S.FORM: Xavier Bettel Xavier Bettel (ryax sa 3 na byacing tay 3 squ kawas na 1973 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1973) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' misuw hya' ga Xavier Bettel, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Xavier Bettel minkahul sa Luxembourg City, Canton na Luxembourg. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1973 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Xavier Bettel Xavier Bettel (ryax sa 3 na byacing tay 3 squ kawas na 1973 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1973) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' misuw hya' ga Xavier Bettel, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Xavier Bettel minkahul sa Luxembourg City, Canton na Luxembourg. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1973 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: xa*ier βettel xa*ier βettel (rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw luxemβourɣ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa xa*ier βettel, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral xa*ier βettel minkaħul s~ɕa luxemβourɣ ʦ~ʨitj, ʦ~ʨanton na luxemβourɣ. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
